  Genspace is a nonprofit community biology lab located in Brooklyn, NY. Their official website confirms their current address is 132 32nd Street, Suite 108, Brooklyn, NY 11232, which matches the shipping address provided. The lab is located in the BRIQ Building and functions as a shared biolab/incubator space for citizen scientists and entrepreneurs. Genspace officially moved to this location in Sunset Park, Brooklyn, in 2017, having previously been located at 33 Flatbush Avenue in downtown Brooklyn.
